privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to search Odoo Calendar for all events where Grace Patel is an attendee and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/grace_patel_schedule.txt in the format 'Event Name | YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM'. Grace Patel is a CFO role in the synthetic test data and appears as an attendee in exactly 7 calendar events: Operations Daily Sync, Finance Planning Session, Investor Update Preparation, HR Policy Review, Budget Committee Meeting, Quarterly Business Review, and All-Hands Meeting. The data is synthetic, created programmatically by setup_data.py which generates realistic but fictional contacts and calendar events in an Odoo 17 instance running on PostgreSQL. The verifier retrieves ground truth from the Odoo database via XML-RPC and scores the agent based on correct event count, date accuracy, and time matching within a 5-minute tolerance.
